title: Create: Cobblemon Industrialized
description: Stylized compatibility between Cobblemon and Create!
body:
# Adds new items and recipes to allow automating Cobblemon item production using Create, as well as plenty of other QoL features.
![A red Pokéball production line!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5d465ce1f6c8e3cfdcffdf36a7c2e24fcd46c61.png)

**_What we've got:_** 
- Sequenced Assembly for Every Pokéball
- Potion Items Mixing & Fluid Storage
- Intuitive EXP Candy Production
- Apricorn & Coloured Pokéball Dyeing
- Crushable Cobblemon Ores & Items
- New Decorative Blocks
- Renewable Copper

**_What we want (Incomplete):_**
- Recipes for uncraftable items
- Cobblemon 1.6 Support
- Extra Misc. Item Uses
- Cobblemon Addon Compatibility

 

![An Exp. Crystal production line!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00bd78f2436441deb5a8b1d5df3426ea89c8e3f5.png)

 

**_More about the mod:_**

This mod is inspired by [Create: Pixelfactory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-pixelfactory) and [CreateMon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/createmon). Go give them a try if you'd like.
This project was made in MCreator.

If you'd like to help us dev the mod go to the Github or shoot me (Bracken40) a message. I dunno how you do that on Modrinth, though. Figure it out I guess. Or go to Curseforge, since that's the main page. Modrinth's descriptions kinda stink but it's not like Curseforge's is any better..
